global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with bold promotional text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting travel destinations with a special sale offer.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one square, are subtly integrated into the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: Another geometric shape, possibly a rectangle, is present, complementing the overall design without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Dream destinations await' is centrally positioned, conveying the main message of the ad.
elements.text_content: destinations await Flexible booking options $4.99 Start now

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: The text 'RouteBloom SALE' is prominently displayed at the top in a contrasting color, drawing immediate attention to the promotion.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Start now' is located at the bottom, inviting users to take action.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and inviting, Dream destinations await, RouteBloom SALE
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the center, the sale announcement is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: destinations await, Flexible booking options, $4.99, Start now, RouteBloom SALE
